TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: Atletico Madrid v Barcelona-Quarter Final, Second Leg
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Atletico Madrid v Barcelona (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the quarter-final second-leg tie from Riyadh Air Metropolitano, as the two Spanish giants go head to head in their quest for a place in this season's semi-finals. The visitors haven't reached the final of this competition since 2015 when they beat Juventus to win the trophy. Their hosts reached the following year's showpiece but lost out again to rivals Real Madrid for the second time in three years.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.subtitle: One Last Call
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: A family drama unravels during a twisted murder plot involving a veteran firefighter; police uncover a shocking clue from the funeral that leads to an unlikely killer.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

Award-winning program anchored by David Muir, featuring unforgettable, character-driven true crime mysteries, exclusive newsmaker interviews, hard-hitting investigative reports and in-depth coverage of high profile stories.

Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO2.HD.us2.title: The Mummy

Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

HBO.West.us2.title: The Spectacular Now
HBO.West.us2.description: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

HBO.West.us2.description: Acerbic comic Bill Maher welcomes a panel of guests from diverse parts of the political spectrum for a lively discussion of current events, as well as offering his own perspective on contemporary issues.

HBO.West.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.West.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.West.us2.title: DTF St. Louis
HBO.West.us2.subtitle: No One's Normal. It Just Looks That Way from Across the Street
HBO.West.us2.description: After a series of revelations, Plumb and Homer question everything they know about the case.

HBO.West.us2.title: Fackham Hall
HBO.West.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.West.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.West.us2.description: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

HBO.West.us2.title: Christy
HBO.West.us2.description: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Brett Goldstein: The Second Best Night of Your Life
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Brett Goldstein, a comedian, writer, actor and swimmer, begins his next big adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Caleb Hearon: Model Comedian
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Caleb Hearon's first stand-up comedy special at Chicago's Constellation; it features him dissecting life's absurdities with charm and wit before a packed house.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Rock: Bigger & Blacker
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Rock performs in a stand-up special, bringing his sharp unforgiving observations to the Apollo Theater.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sarah Squirm: Live + in the Flesh
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Sarah Sherman's unholy alter ego, Sarah Squirm, unleashes a festering hour of bodily fluids, open-wound confessionals and jokes that will leave scars on the soul.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Practical Magic
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Sally and Gillian Owens, born into a magical family, have mostly avoided witchcraft themselves. But when Gillian's vicious boyfriend, Jimmy Angelov, dies unexpectedly, the Owens sisters give themselves a crash course in hard magic. With policeman Gary Hallet growing suspicious, the girls struggle to resurrect Angelov -- and unwittingly inject his corpse with an evil spirit that threatens to end their family line.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Starter for 10
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Brian Jackson (James McAvoy), a working-class youth from Essex, gets a chance to prove himself when he is accepted to respected Bristol University. As Brian navigates his way through his first year there, he finds romance with two pretty students (Alice Eve, Rebecca Hall) and tries out for a popular TV program called "University Challenge.".

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Eddington
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Get Him to the Greek
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Release the Brown Fat
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Writer Greg Russo arrives at Ludlow College to support his daughter Katie as her marriage begins to implode.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Trousers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: When Katie's future at Ludlow is thrown into question, Walt offers Greg a deal to keep them both on campus.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: White Whale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Greg navigates his first day as a teacher at Ludlow, Katie deals with being suspended, and Archie assists Sunny in finding an advisor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: To avoid Walt's party, Greg dedicates himself to a student; with her suspension lifted, Katie considers one-night stands.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: George Lopez: America's Mexican
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic performs at the Dodge Theater in Phoenix; topics include immigration, modern children, interracial relationships and dementia.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Jerrod Carmichael: Don't Be Gay
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Emmy-winning comedian Jerrod Carmichael takes to the stage for his latest comedy special, bringing his signature blend of unbridled honesty, emotional gut punches and sharp, dry wit.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Jerrod Carmichael: Love at the Store
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic discusses topics including poverty, wealth, crime and race in a performance at the Comedy Store in Hollywood, Calif.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Girls Trip
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Lobster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Fackham Hall
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: A Minecraft Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic/talk-show host highlights his personal reflections in a one-man off-Broadway show taped at the Tribeca Performing Arts Center in New York.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Trousers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: When Katie's future at Ludlow is thrown into question, Walt offers Greg a deal to keep them both on campus.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: White Whale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Greg navigates his first day as a teacher at Ludlow, Katie deals with being suspended, and Archie assists Sunny in finding an advisor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO Batman Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: There are big changes brewing in Gotham, but if Batman (Will Arnett) wants to save the city from the Joker's (Zach Galifianakis) hostile takeover, he may have to drop the lone vigilante thing, try to work with others and maybe, just maybe, learn to lighten up. Maybe his superhero sidekick Robin (Michael Cera) and loyal butler Alfred (Ralph Fiennes) can show him a thing or two.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Clear History
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An angry man concocts an elaborate plan for revenge when his old boss visits the island that he calls home.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: House Party
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Tour de Pharmacy
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Five competitors provide an inside look at the world of professional cycling and its checkered history with doping.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Zola
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Coastal Elites
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Five characters in isolation react with frustration, hilarity and introspection as they grapple with politics, culture, and the pandemic.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Game Night
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Max and Annie's weekly game night gets kicked up a notch when Max's brother Brooks arranges a murder mystery party -- complete with fake thugs and federal agents. So when Brooks gets kidnapped, it's all supposed to be part of the game. As the competitors set out to solve the case, they start to learn that neither the game nor Brooks are what they seem to be. The friends soon find themselves in over their heads as each twist leads to another unexpected turn over the course of one chaotic night.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bring Her Back
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Town
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Doug MacRay leads a band of ruthless bank robbers and has no real attachments except for James, who -- despite his dangerous temper -- is like a brother. Everything changes for Doug when James briefly takes a hostage, bank employee Claire Keesey. Learning that she lives in the gang's neighborhood, Doug seeks her out to discover what she knows, and he falls in love. As the romance deepens, he wants out of his criminal life, but that could threaten Claire.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Whoopi Goldberg Presents Moms Mabley
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Filmmaker Whoopi Goldberg examines the life and work of stand-up comic Moms Mabley.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: All Eyez on Me
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The true and untold story of prolific rapper, actor, poet and activist Tupac Shakur (Demetrius Shipp Jr.), from his early days in New York to his status as one of the world's most recognized and influential voices. Against all odds, Shakur's raw talent, powerful lyrics and revolutionary mindset establish him as a cultural icon whose legacy continues to grow long after his death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Whitney Houston: I Wanna Dance With Somebody
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Discovered by record executive Clive Davis, Whitney Houston rises to fame in the 1980s to become one of the greatest singers of her generation.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 4

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina

After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Spectacular Now
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mortal Kombat

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Here to Climb

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Smashing Machine

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Babygirl

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Warfare
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Most Violent Year

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Enemy

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Wuthering Heights
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ethel

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Call Me by Your Name

He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Blair Witch Project
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Found video footage tells the tale of three film students (Heather Donahue, Joshua Leonard, Michael C. Williams) who've traveled to a small town to collect documentary footage about the Blair Witch, a legendary local murderer. Over the course of several days, the students interview townspeople and gather clues to support the tale's veracity. But the project takes a frightening turn when the students lose their way in the woods and begin hearing horrific noises.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As it follows the twisted path traveled by five people fixated on "The Blair Witch Project," "Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2" journeys into a dark and dangerous place where the line between truth and fiction blurs and perhaps vanishes altogether. Individual perception grows increasingly untrustworthy as the film's protagonists find themselves caught in a vortex of unspeakable evil, the origins of which -- human or supernatural -- remain chillingly uncertain.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Blair Witch
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A young man and his friends venture into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland to uncover the mystery surrounding his missing sister. Many believe her disappearance 17 years earlier is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. At first the group is hopeful, especially when two locals act as guides through the dark and winding woods. As the night wears on, a visit from a menacing presence soon makes them realize that the legend is all too real, and more sinister than they could have ever imagined.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Insidious
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Men

NBC.East.Stream.us2.title: Open House
NBC.East.Stream.us2.description: Buying a house can be a stressful, time-consuming process, which is why people turn to shows such as "Open House" to get help in the real estate market. Hosts Sara Gore and George Oliphant (who also rescues homeowners' renovation projects on sister show "George to the Rescue," which began as a segment of "Open House" before becoming a stand-alone show) showcase some of the hottest homes on the market in major cities, get interior design tips from experts and provide information on what people need to know about stylish living.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future Part III

Fox) obtains a 70-year-old message from the time-traveling Dr. Emmett Brown (Christopher Lloyd), in which he informs Marty that he has retired to a small town in the Old West. Marty then finds out that the Doc was murdered shortly after sending the letter. In order to save his friend, Marty will have to travel back in time, disentangle a lovestruck Doc from a local schoolmarm, and repair the DeLorean -- all while avoiding a posse of gunslingers.

AMC.HD.us2.title: WarGames
AMC.HD.us2.description: High school student David Lightman unwittingly hacks into a military supercomputer while searching for new video games. After starting a game of Global Thermonuclear War, Lightman leads the supercomputer to activate the nation's nuclear arsenal in response to his simulated threat as the Soviet Union. Once the clueless hacker comes to his senses, Lightman, with help from his girlfriend, must find a way to alert the authorities to stop the onset of World War III.

AMC.HD.us2.title: A Few Good Men
AMC.HD.us2.description: Lt. Daniel Kaffee (Tom Cruise) is a military lawyer defending two U.S. Marines charged with killing a fellow Marine at the Guantánamo Bay Naval Base in Cuba. Although Kaffee is known for seeking plea bargains, a fellow lawyer, Lt. Cdr. JoAnne Galloway (Demi Moore), convinces him that the accused marines were most likely carrying out an order from a commanding officer. Kaffee takes a risk by calling Col. Nathan R. Jessep (Jack Nicholson) to the stand in an effort to uncover the conspiracy.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Moneyball
AMC.HD.us2.description: Billy Beane (Brad Pitt), general manager of the Oakland A's, one day has an epiphany: Baseball's conventional wisdom is all wrong. Faced with a tight budget, Beane must reinvent his team by outsmarting the richer ball clubs. Joining forces with Ivy League graduate Peter Brand (Jonah Hill), Beane prepares to challenge old-school traditions. He recruits bargain-bin players whom the scouts have labeled as flawed, but have game-winning potential. Based on the book by Michael Lewis.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Twelve
AMC.HD.us2.description: After successfully robbing five casinos in one night, Danny Ocean and his crew of thieves have big problems. Despite pulling off one of the biggest heists in Las Vegas history, the members of the gang have already spent much of the money they stole. Casino owner Terry Benedict demands that Ocean return the money, plus millions more in interest. Unable to come up the cash, the crew is forced to come together to pull off another series of heists, this time in Europe.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Eleven
AMC.HD.us2.description: Dapper Danny Ocean is a man of action. Less than 24 hours into his parole from a New Jersey penitentiary, the wry, charismatic thief is already rolling out his next plan. Following three rules: Don't hurt anybody, don't steal from anyone who doesn't deserve it, and play the game like you've got nothing to lose. Danny orchestrates the most sophisticated, elaborate casino heist in history.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Martian

With only a meager amount of supplies, the stranded visitor must utilize his wits and spirit to find a way to survive on the hostile planet. Meanwhile, back on Earth, members of NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home, while his crew mates hatch their own plan for a daring rescue mission.

He recruits bargain-bin players whom the scouts have labeled as flawed, but have game-winning potential. Based on the book by Michael Lewis.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Twelve
AMC.HD.us2.description: After successfully robbing five casinos in one night, Danny Ocean and his crew of thieves have big problems. Despite pulling off one of the biggest heists in Las Vegas history, the members of the gang have already spent much of the money they stole. Casino owner Terry Benedict demands that Ocean return the money, plus millions more in interest. Unable to come up the cash, the crew is forced to come together to pull off another series of heists, this time in Europe.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future Part III
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this final chapter, Marty McFly (Michael J. Fox) obtains a 70-year-old message from the time-traveling Dr. Emmett Brown (Christopher Lloyd), in which he informs Marty that he has retired to a small town in the Old West. Marty then finds out that the Doc was murdered shortly after sending the letter. In order to save his friend, Marty will have to travel back in time, disentangle a lovestruck Doc from a local schoolmarm, and repair the DeLorean -- all while avoiding a posse of gunslingers.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this 1980s sci-fi classic, small-town California teen Marty McFly is thrown back into the '50s when an experiment by his eccentric scientist friend Doc Brown goes awry. Traveling through time in a modified DeLorean car, Marty encounters young versions of his parents, and must make sure that they fall in love, or he'll cease to exist. Even more dauntingly, Marty has to return to his own time and save the life of Doc Brown.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Back to the Future Part II
AMC.HD.us2.description: In this zany sequel, time-traveling duo Marty McFly and Dr. Emmett Brown return from saving Marty's future son from disaster, only to discover their own time transformed. In this nightmarish version of Hill Valley, Marty's father has been murdered and Biff Tannen, Marty's nemesis, has profited. After uncovering the secret to Biff's success -- a sports almanac from the future -- Marty and the Doc embark on a quest to repair the space-time continuum.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Audacity
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Best of All Possible Worlds
AMC.HD.us2.description: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Silence of the Lambs
AMC.HD.us2.description: Jodie Foster stars as Clarice Starling, a top student at the FBI's training academy. Jack Crawford (Scott Glenn) wants Clarice to interview Dr. Hannibal Lecter (Anthony Hopkins), a brilliant psychiatrist who is also a violent psychopath, serving life behind bars for various acts of murder and cannibalism. Crawford believes that Lecter may have insight into a case and that Starling, as an attractive young woman, may be just the bait to draw him out.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hermano de Elizabeth, influenciado por un videojuego, acuchilla a un niño de once años. Jenifer fue golpeada por su marido al descubrirse su infidelidad, ahora ella demanda al investigador privado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Erick se queja de que Aidé, la novia de su padre, lo haga actuar como un perro para satisfacer sus fantasías sexuales. Ella no ve nada malo en que le guste jugar sexualmente a los animales.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aurora está obsesionada con encontrar al hombre perfecto para casarse. Conoce a Damián, un dentista, y le da a entender a todos que son novios. Luego, se ve enredada en un juego amoroso.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá se cansó de luchar
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: César está preocupado porque su madre asegura que se curó del cáncer que la afectó durante siete años, pero él insiste en que confirme el diagnóstico con una segunda opinión médica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lo amo con todo mi odio; Amor de estudiante
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Salemni ha intentado matar al padre de su hija porque no se ocupa de ella ni le pasa la manutención. Además, Sarah descubre a su hija con un profesor en un hotel y la obliga a casarse.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Enferma por mentira; Infarto sexual
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Con mentiras, Oscar ha recaudado más dinero del necesario para supuestamente ayudar a la hermana de Arianna. David cree que su hermana y su madrastra mataron del susto a su padre por dinero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Todo por mis quince
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alba perdió a su bebé en un terremoto, pero logró rehacer su vida y tuvo una segunda hija, Ximena. Una adolescente rebelde que simula su propio secuestro porque sus padres le negaron una fiesta de 15 años.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hasta mañana, mi amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El día de bodas de una pareja es arruinado cuando el novio sufre un grave accidente que lo deja paralítico. La vida de los dos se vuelve un infierno, pero el destino les tiene una sorpresa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La pasión de Diego
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Diego logra rescatar a Circe de las garras de Joselito, la lleva a donde él vive y cura sus heridas. La Mami Chula aprovecha la ocasión para recordarle que él siempre será de ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mucha risa y pocos premios
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los hermanos Luis y Leobardo llegan ilusionados con ganar el automóvil, no será fácil. Patricia y su cuñado Misael quieren ganar el dinero en efectivo, pero una vez más, la jaula es implacable.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bebé en el toilet
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Abril está embarazada y tiene un encuentro con Geraldine, la amante de su esposo. Luego, sufre en el baño un aborto espontáneo, el feto cae al suelo y Geraldine, en la confusión, lo bota en el inodoro y tira la cadena.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Premier League: Extra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la información que buscas antes y después de cada jornada en Premier League: análisis previo, datos clave, protagonistas y el mejor repaso tras los partidos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Premier League
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Toda la acción de la jornada 32 de la temporada regular 2025-26 de la Premier League. Desde el Old Trafford, en Manchester. Los Red Devils buscan afianzar su plaza en la Champions League.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Bondad y temor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El padre Gustavo sufre un tormento por la confesión de una feligresa que lo lleva a una encrucijada entre la complicidad, el deber y la fe. Si habla, traicionará a su propia madre.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: César está preocupado porque su madre asegura que se curó del cáncer que la afectó durante siete años, pero él insiste en que confirme el diagnóstico con una segunda opinión médica.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi suegra me adelantó el parto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luisa denuncia que su bebé está hospitalizado y corre peligro porque se le adelantó el parto tras ser agredida por su suegra Lilia, quien la acusa de mentir sobre la paternidad de su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sea infiel, use condón; Escándalo, basura y anarquía
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Para demostrar que cualquier persona puede ser infiel, Melisa contrata a Victoria. Kalan, que vive como un vagabundo, le regala a su amigo Diego un local en Nueva York a cambio de dejarlo dormir atrás.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ella quiere que su pareja deje de consumir "Morning glory". Él alega que la sustancia mejora su productividad. Alexander perdió la custodia de su hijo al entrar en prisión y el menor se suicidó.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por cobarde perdí a mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lulú quiere dejar a Lisandro tras 18 años de maltrato y recuperar la relación con sus cuatro hijos, quienes abandonaron el hogar porque también fueron agredidos por su padrastro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Juego de seducción
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de la visita de la tía del verdadero Emiliano Guevara, Isabel busca a Diego y, cuando entra a su habitación, se lleva la gran sorpresa de su vida. Circe tiende una trampa a Augusto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Si cruzas la frontera te mato; Piratería en la industria musical
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Fabio tiene una finca en la frontera con México y mata a los indocumentados que cruzan por ahí. Además, Vicente es un músico que se quedó rezagado con la tecnología, y su hija se aprovecha.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Leonor se siente sola porque su hijo solo la busca cuando necesita dinero y un día se encariña con tres niños huérfanos. Pero ellos caen en manos de su padrastro que es un criminal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Obligado por las circunstancias, un padre se tiene que separar de su hijo. Además, Andrea demanda a los padres de la niña que alquiló y exige que le devuelvan el dinero del depósito.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lola esteroides; Un cuadro doloroso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lola obliga a su esposo Rocco a inyectarse esteroides para tener mejor desempeño físico y sexual. Además, Ángela descubrió que una alumna está siendo abusada por un familiar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El amor no tiene edad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Clara es una mujer adulta que nunca se casó y vive para cuidar a su padre. Con la ayuda de su sobrina, ella tiene la oportunidad de descubrir lo que es el amor. Pero su felicidad durará poco.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Madre sólo hay una
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Silvana tiene un hijo y su madre decide criarlo como si fuese suyo. Durante años, todos viven en la mentira, hasta que la verdad sale a la luz.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dos amores, dos milagros
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Una pareja se entera que va a tener gemelas, pero el día del parto solo recibe a una de las niñas. El médico les informa que una de las bebés no sobrevivió. Pero la madre sospecha que no fue así.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Muxhe
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Refugio tiene disforia de género y es víctima de abuso en la escuela, incluso su propio padre lo llama "rarito", pero ella defiende el derecho del niño de recibir un trato digno.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No mereces mi amor
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Beto se divierte al seducir a María, la empleada doméstica de su casa, quien termina embarazada. Ahora, él quiere librarse del problema a toda costa, ella decide no quedarse de brazos cruzados.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sastres entretenidos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dulce y Édgar hacen lo posible para ganar una sala de entretenimiento. Fernando y Rodrigo, amigos y colegas de baile, se mueven al son de las preguntas y retos, un mal paso podría ser letal.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Enfrentar el miedo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Brenda encara una tarea pendiente y su mayor miedo al recibir esa visita inesperada, pero no es la primera vez, ella tiene una segunda oportunidad para extender su tiempo de vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por cobarde perdí a mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lulú quiere dejar a Lisandro tras 18 años de maltrato y recuperar la relación con sus cuatro hijos, quienes abandonaron el hogar porque también fueron agredidos por su padrastro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Usa su embarazo para sacarme dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel está dispuesto a confesarle a su esposa, embarazada, que le fue infiel. No soporta el chantaje económico de Vianey, con quien también espera un bebé tras una noche de copas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Salvando al bastardo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carlos tiene dos hijos, uno con su esposa y otro con su amante, el segundo tiene leucemia y necesita un trasplante urgente de su hermano que es compatible, pero la madre no lo autoriza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe mueve sus fichas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula planea matar dos pájaros de un solo tiro. Logra que Joselito y su traidor, Augusto, vayan a buscarla y allí espera eliminarlos. Diego sufre por Isabel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Fútbol Femenino Amistosos Internacionales
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Desde el Lumen Field, en Seattle, Estados Unidos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Adolescente malvada; Mesero maldito
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El hijo de Karla está preso porque supuestamente violó a la hija de Manuela. Además, Cristian es un mesero, sin papeles, que fue despedido por pedirles documentación a los clientes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La pierna sufrida; Ni un parto más
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rosaura se cambiaba el vendaje de su pierna amputada y la echaron del restaurante. Fabiola no está bien mentalmente, tiene cinco hijos de relaciones con desconocidos y su hermano quiere ligarla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial de niños
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El misterio de la astrología y los secretos del amor se unen en el primer programa de citas guiado por los astros.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lo mejor: Hombres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Especial deportes
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Navidades
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Si yo fuera rica
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luz se avergüenza de ser la hija de una sirvienta e inventa un montón de mentiras para que nadie lo sepa. Cuando se conoce la verdad, sus actos tienen consecuencias y todos rechazan su actitud.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Usa su embarazo para sacarme dinero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel está dispuesto a confesarle a su esposa, embarazada, que le fue infiel. No soporta el chantaje económico de Vianey, con quien también espera un bebé tras una noche de copas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tierra de nadie; Descuido fatal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Nancy y María Elena viven entre el río Bravo y el muro fronterizo, y María Elena ayuda a los indocumentados. Además, la hija de Pedro tiene trece años, y solo cuando está con él se comporta bien.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Stripper menor de edad; No a la comida chatarra
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: En su despedida de soltero, Félix contrató a dos strippers hermanas y una de ellas era menor de edad. Además, a David le queda poco tiempo de vida por su obesidad a causa de la comida chatarra.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me lo dice el corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Octavio no encuentra trabajo y decide irse a Estados Unidos a buscar una oportunidad, pero en lugar de ayudarlo a cruzar la frontera, lo secuestran. Amalia, su esposa, nunca pierde la esperanza de recuperarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Dulces Quince
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Nancy está por celebrar sus 15 años, pero su hermano Rodolfo, mal aconsejado por Andrés, toma una decisión equivocada. Invierte el dinero que sus padres han ahorrado para la fiesta en un negocio dudoso.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Huésped de mi corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniel y Sofía están muy enamorados y planean un futuro juntos. Pero su sueño se ve arruinado cuando alguien se encarga en separarlos por la envidia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: No te creí
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Estela inicia una nueva relación y nunca se percata de que Humberto, su nueva pareja, acosa a su hija Mariana. A pesar de las advertencias, se niega a aceptarlo hasta que es demasiado tarde.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Renace la esperanza
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juventino es víctima de una detención arbitraria, violenta e injusta, cuando lo involucran en un delito de narcomenudeo. Jerónima, su madre, emprende un vía crucis para demostrar su inocencia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Circe mueve sus fichas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La Mami Chula planea matar dos pájaros de un solo tiro. Logra que Joselito y su traidor, Augusto, vayan a buscarla y allí espera eliminarlos. Diego sufre por Isabel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La abejita contra la puerta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Los esposos Beatriz y Arturo se enfrentan a difíciles preguntas para ganar un automóvil. Jesús y Josué, padre e hijo, quieren llevarse la mayor cantidad de premios posible, pero aparece Sia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sospecha de muerte
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joel, deprimido tras la pérdida de su hermana y al enterarse de su destino, decide indagar qué pasó realmente el día de su muerte, sin saber que el culpable podría ser alguien de su familia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por defenderla puedo ir preso
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Hablar de los problemas es el primer paso para superarlos y, por eso, Rocío trae un programa único para hablar de las preocupaciones de cada día y, en conjunto, encontrar una solución.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por un chamaco nos echó de la casa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tras superar la muerte de su esposo, Margarita echa a su hija Sayra de la casa luego de iniciar un romance con Alonso, exnovio de su nieta Alanis, a quien señala de borracha.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Twerking; Odor Dating
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Giselle conoció a Víctor y este la introdujo en el mundo de la droga y el "twerking", pero ahora él la quiere dejar. Milady tiene una condición que hace que todo su cuerpo huela a pescado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Profanación de mi madre; Mexicano engatusado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Sofía ve un video de alguien orinando la tumba de su madre: el hombre es su medio hermano. César se casó con Guillermo para obtener los papeles y fue a la cita de Inmigración vestida de mujer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Soy tu madre, no tu payasa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Rita acusa a Juana, su madre, de convertirse en la aliada de su nieta para obtener permisos y quitarle autoridad sobre su hija, quien rechaza la relación con Roberto, su nuevo esposo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Traición
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Circe disfruta de ver a Joselito y Augusto amarrados. Decide cobrarse cada una de las deudas que sus enemigos le deben. Don Mateo quiere encargarse de un nuevo negocio para tener más dinero.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Herencia asesina; Musulmán virgen
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Después de conocer al joven que asesinó a su hija, siente afinidad por él y quiere adoptar a su niño. Arif Khan es musulmán y Arianne lo despidió de su empresa por temor a que sea terrorista.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Barcelona-Espanyol
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Real Sociedad-Alavés
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La solvente victoria sobre el Levante supuso un paso más de los donostiarras hacia posiciones de competición europea. Los de Quique S. Flores siguen intentando cerrar cuanto antes la permanencia con un exigente calendario por delante.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Especiales LaLiga EA Sports fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Previo UEFA Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Atlético de Madrid-Barcelona
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Espacio que se emite antes del comienzo de una nueva jornada de la Champions League. En él se repasa la actualidad de los equipos españoles que participan en la competición y se hacen previas de todos los partidos que se disputan durante la semana.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Atlético de Madrid-Barcelona
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La máxima competición del deporte europeo garantiza emoción y buen fútbol. 36 equipos se juegan el pase a la gloria durante una fase liga antes de llegar a las eliminatorias, en las que los partidos son a cara de perro. El PSG defiende título.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Post UEFA Champions League
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Atlético de Madrid-Barcelona
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza los partidos con las mejores imágenes, intenta esclarecer las polémicas y da la palabra a los que han sido los protagonistas sobre el césped.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Sevilla-Atlético de Madrid
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los mejores clubes del país protagonizan LaLiga, el campeonato de la regularidad del fútbol español. El torneo es una carrera de fondo en la que los equipos pelean por sus metas: la salvación, Europa, la Champions o el título. El Barcelona defiende corona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Leganés - Albacete
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: CD Leganés buscará imponer ritmo y ganar metros con amplitud, atacando el área con paciencia y control del tempo. Duelo con puntos que mueven la aguja en la categoría: Albacete Balompié intentará sostenerse con orden y castigar en transición o estrategia; los detalles en las áreas marcarán el guion.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Especiales LaLiga fin de temporada
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: El sentido: Laliga Genuine
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LaLiga EA Sports ha finalizado otro curso plagado de historias y de fútbol. El campeonato español de la regularidad deja relatos para el recuerdo y héroes que se han convertido en los protagonistas de la temporada.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Das Magazin konzentriert sich auf den Fußball in Saudi-Arabien. Es bietet eine umfassende Berichterstattung über die nationale Liga, wichtige Spiele und Spieler sowie Entwicklungen im saudischen Fußball insgesamt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Brasilien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Campeonato Brasileiro (11. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Es werden alle Tore der höchsten brasilianischen Spielklasse, der 20 Teams umfassenden Série A, gezeigt. Darüber hinaus gibt es alles Wissenwerte zum Fußball in Brasilien, der viele Stars hervorbringt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Argentinien! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Liga Profesional Apertura (14. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Fußball aus der ganzen Welt mit allen Höhepunkten aus den internationalen Top-Ligen. In dieser Ausgebe von "scooore" werden die spektakulärsten und wichtigsten Szenen aus der höchsten Argentinischen Fußball-Liga gezeigt. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Scooore! – Internationales Fußball-Magazin
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Tore und Ergebnisse international
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Gezeigt werden Szenen aus der Eredivisie (Niederlande), Liga NOS (Portugal), Hyundai A-League (Australien), J. League (Japan) sowie die Copa Libertadores, Copa Sudamericana und Copa do Brasil. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: scooore Niederlande! Alle Tore
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Highlights Eredivisie (30. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Vorhang auf für das Oberhaus des niederländischen Fußballs: Die Eredivisie hat auch hierzulande viele Fans. Deshalb zeigt sportdigital die Highlights der aktuellen Spieltage als Erstausstrahlung. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: Copa Sudamericana
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Racing Club (ARG) – Botafogo (BRA) (Gruppenphase, 2. Spieltag)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Im zweitwichtigsten Wettbewerg des südamerikanischen Vereinsfußballs waren bisher die Vereine aus Argentinien am erfolgreichsten. Titelverteidiger ist in diesem Jahr CSD Defensa Justicia aus Florencia Varela in Argentinien. (Senderinfo).

sportdigital.Fussball.de.title: Fußball: AFC Champions League Two
sportdigital.Fussball.de.subtitle: Bangkok United (THAI) – Gamba Osaka (J) (Halbfinale, Rückspiel)
sportdigital.Fussball.de.description: Der AFC Cup ist für Asien das, was die UEFA Europa League für Europa ist: der zweithöchste Fußballwettbewerb für die Vereinsmannschaften auf dem Kontinent.  (Senderinfo).

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC 327: Procházka vs. Ulberg - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: When UFC returns to Miami in April, it will do so with a numbered event headlined by a pair of championship bouts as UFC 327 takes place on Saturday, April 12 at Kaseya Center in Miami, Florida. The event will be headlined by a battle for the vacant UFC light heavyweight title between former champion and second-ranked Jiri Prochazka and surging contender Carlos “Black Jag” Ulberg. In the co-main event of the evening, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title for the first time against Tatsuro Taira

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Main Event  - UFC297 - Strickland vs Du Plessis
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC Middleweight Champion Sean Strickland defends his title against South African contender Dricus Du Plessis in a thrilling showdown at UFC 297. Watch the full championship fight on this episode of Main Event.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT - LALIGA HISTORIC MOMENTS GERARD PIQUE'S RETIREMENT
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Barcelona club captain and Spanish national team legend Gerard Pique has called time on his career. This is a whirlwind look back at the illustrious career of a man who has won everything the game has to offer.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Fight Night: Moicano vs. Duncan - Prelims
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: As UFC returns to the Meta APEX to begin the second quarter on Saturday, April 5, it does so with a Fight Night event headlined by a lightweight matchup carrying a high potential for fireworks as Renato Moicano squares off with Chris “The Problem” Duncan. Currently stationed at No. 10 in the rankings, Moicano has crafted a reputation as an all-action fighter and notoriously tough out for anyone in the division.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: UFC Reloaded - UFC 312: Du Plessis vs Strickland
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: UFC returns down under to Sydney, Austalia, where Middleweight champion Dricus Du Plessis defends his crown against Sean Strickland, the man he took it from, and undefeated TUF 23 winner Tatiana Suarez aims to unseat 2-time champion Zhang Weili for the Women's Strawweight title. Plus more on UFC Reloaded!

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Mencari Ramli Musim Ke - 3 - 8
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Mencari Ramli adalah program pencarian bakat bola sepak yang hebat. Program ini memberi peluang kepada bakat muda untuk merealisasikan impian mereka menjadi pemain bola sepak terbaik di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa. Program ini mencungkil bakat bola sepak anak-anak muda berusia bawah 14 tahun dan bawah 16 tahun.

unifi.unifisports1.my.title: Sensasi Bola - 3
unifi.unifisports1.my.description: Sensasi Bola merupakan satu program bual bicara berdurasi setengah jam bersama pemain bola sepak, selebriti, jurulatih dan peminat sebagai tetamu undangan setiap minggu. Antara topik menarik yang akan dikupas adalah isu mengenai bola sepak tempatan dan antarabangsa, temubual ekslusif bersama lagenda bola sepak, tips kesihatan serta isu semasa yang menjadi perbualan masa kini.
